title: IPAMORELIN
description: Ipamorelin is the most selective GHRP, producing clean GH release without significantly affecting cortisol, prolactin, or appetite. It's considered the 'cleanest' growth hormone releasing peptide with minimal side effects.

research.title: Pharmacokinetic-pharmacodynamic modeling of ipamorelin, a growth hormone releasing peptide, in human volunteers
research.summary: Study examining how ipamorelin affects hormone levels in healthy males, showing dose-dependent growth hormone release with a short duration.

research.title: Prospective, randomized, controlled, proof-of-concept study of the Ghrelin mimetic ipamorelin for the management of postoperative ileus in bowel resection patients
research.summary: Testing safety and effectiveness of ipamorelin in treating postoperative ileus after bowel surgery; found well-tolerated but no significant improvement over placebo.

research.title: Beyond the androgen receptor: the role of growth hormone secretagogues in the modern management of body composition in hypogonadal males
research.summary: Explores growth hormone secretagogues like ipamorelin as potential therapies for male hypogonadism and improving body composition.

research.title: Ipamorelin, a new growth-hormone-releasing peptide, induces longitudinal bone growth in rats
research.summary: Ipamorelin significantly increased bone growth rate and body weight in female rats in a dose-dependent manner.

research.title: The growth hormone secretagogue ipamorelin counteracts glucocorticoid-induced decrease in bone formation of adult rats
research.summary: Combined ipamorelin with steroid treatment improved muscle strength and bone formation compared to steroid alone.

research.title: The GH secretagogues ipamorelin and GH-releasing peptide-6 increase bone mineral content in adult female rats
research.summary: Both ipamorelin and GHRP-6 increased bone mineral content and body weight in young adult female rats.

sentiment.summary: Highly regarded for its clean effects and excellent tolerability. Users prefer it for GH benefits without hunger stimulation or hormonal disruption. Often the recommended starting GHRP.

effects.label: Reliable Results:
effects.description: Consistent GH release with excellent tolerability.

effects.label: Synergistic:
effects.description: Combines well with CJC-1295 for amplified effects.

dosage.label: Timing:
dosage.description: Best on empty stomach, especially before bed.

sideEffects.label: Minimal:
sideEffects.description: Fewest side effects of any GHRP.
